title: Hydrion-L
description: An optimized integration package for Minecraft version 1.21.1 fabric
body:
### **Hydrion-L**
![@hydrion-l logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f9efe2e3485bb054cdc3b935606e93a5017ec36_0.webp)
# 🧐**What is it**
### This is a modpack for version 1.21.1 of Minecraft using Fabric.
### Its main purpose is to optimize the frame rate and algorithms of the original version. 
### While it sacrifices some compatibility, it offers a significant performance improvement. 
If u wish to prioritize compatibility, please refer to Hydrion-X 

_By the way,the "Hydrion" in name is equals to "proton"😂_
# ⚡**Optimize performance and comparisons**
![comp!1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b9506853dfa04a1f02f68126ff4c71bfed6f2ec.png)
![comp!2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46671e2243a0de32ddb8b38097e65eba1f62feea.png)
# ⭐**Why choose Hydrion?**
### Compared to other optimization mods, we only focus on real optimization, so we can bring higher frame rates.We don't just use sodium, we've added more comprehensive optimization mods to make the game even better.
# 😜**Others**
### If you're going to play multiplayer, we also offer multiplayer and server mod packs
